detectors.description:
SmartTradingGoldBot.getWeekdaySeconds(uint256,uint256) (contracts/SmartTradingGoldBot.sol#43-63) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- fullWeeks = totalSeconds / (604800) (contracts/SmartTradingGoldBot.sol#46-47)
	- weekdaySeconds = fullWeeks * 432000 (contracts/SmartTradingGoldBot.sol#47-48)
